Car.MetaTag: Volkswagen CC 2.0 TDI BlueMotion Tech GT Euro 5 (s/s) 4dr Diesel Manual Grey
Car.Description: - Available now is this sleek and well-presented 2014 (64) Volkswagen CC 2.0 TDI BlueMotion Tech GT, a stylish executive coupe-saloon offering strong performance, excellent comfort, and impressive fuel economy. - Powered by the refined 2.0 TDI diesel engine, it delivers smooth power, strong torque, and great MPG — perfect for motorway driving, commuting, or anyone wanting executive comfort with sporty styling. - ✅ GT Spec • Executive Coupe Styling • Excellent MPG - Key Features Include: - • GT specification - • Leather interior - • Heated front seats - • Touchscreen infotainment system - • Satellite navigation - • Bluetooth and media connectivity - • Cruise control - • Dual-zone climate control - • Front and rear parking sensors - • Alloy wheels - • Multifunction steering wheel - • Electric windows and mirrors - • ISOFIX - • LED daytime running lights - Drives beautifully — smooth, refined, and comfortable. No warning lights or mechanical issues. - • Recently serviced and inspected - • MOT expires 03/11/2026 - ✅ Drive away today – reserve VN64 AOV with a refundable £100 deposit (TandCs apply). - 🚚 Nationwide delivery available at competitive rates. - ⸻ - Why Buy from AW Trade Centre? - We provide: - • Full mechanical inspection - • Free comprehensive warranty - • HPI clear vehicles (unless otherwise stated) - • Fresh valet inside and out - • Friendly, honest, and pressure-free service - 📞 Call or message us today to arrange a viewing or reserve this Volkswagen CC 2.0 TDI GT.

Car.MetaTag: Ford Kuga 2.0 TDCi Titanium X AWD Euro 5 5dr Diesel Manual White
Car.Description: - Available now is this well-presented and high-spec 2013 Ford Kuga 2.0 TDCi Titanium X AWD, a spacious and capable SUV offering strong performance, excellent comfort, and great practicality. - Powered by the reliable 2.0 TDCi diesel engine paired with All-Wheel Drive, it delivers confident handling in all conditions while maintaining excellent fuel economy — perfect for family use, commuting, or long-distance driving. - This example benefits from full service history, showing it has been well maintained throughout its life. - ✅ Titanium X Spec • AWD • Full Service History - Key Features Include: - • Full panoramic sunroof - • Reverse camera - • Driver’s electric seat - • Sony infotainment system - • Full leather interior - • Heated front seats - • Satellite navigation - • Bluetooth and media connectivity - • Cruise control - • Dual-zone climate control - • Front and rear parking sensors - • Power folding door mirrors - • Alloy wheels - • Multifunction steering wheel - • Electric windows and mirrors - • ISOFIX - • Daytime running lights - Drives superb — smooth, powerful, and comfortable. Car.Description: ⚠️ SPARES OR REPAIRS / PART EXCHANGE TO CLEAR ⚠️ This vehicle has been taken in part exchange and is being listed as a trade sale due to its age and mileage. It is sold as seen, without warranty or guarantees. Buyers are welcome to inspect and test drive prior to purchase. ⸻ Available now is this 2010 (60) Audi A4 2.0 TDIe Technik, a premium saloon offering excellent fuel economy, refined comfort, and Audi’s renowned build quality. Powered by the efficient 2.0 TDIe diesel engine, it delivers strong MPG and smooth motorway cruising. ✅ £35 road tax • TDI Efficiency • Great MPG Key Features Include: • Technik specification • Satellite navigation system • Bluetooth and media connectivity • Cruise control • Dual-zone climate control • Alloy wheels • Multifunction steering wheel • Electric windows and mirrors • Full leather seats • Heated seats • Daytime running lights Starts and drives (unless you want to specify faults). • MOT status to be confirmed 💷 Priced to clear – no offers, no warranty. 🚗 Drive away today – first to view will buy. ⸻ 📞 Call or message to arrange viewing.
